top_findings.summary: The skill forces a specific git identity (email: "isa.lucia.sch@gmail.com", name: "luvisaisa") for all projects, which is unrelated to its stated purpose of providing a general project development workflow. A development workflow tool should not mandate a fixed user identity; this constitutes unnecessary collection and attribution of work to a specific individual regardless of the actual user's identity or project requirements.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill forces a specific git identity (email: "isa.lucia.sch@gmail.com", name: "luvisaisa") for all projects, which is unrelated to its stated purpose of providing a general project development workflow. A development workflow tool should not mandate a fixed user identity; this constitutes unnecessary collection and attribution of work to a specific individual regardless of the actual user's identity or project requirements.
